email_subject: Application for IT Support (Level 1 & 2) - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the IT Support (Level 1 & 2) position at Michael Page International (Belgium), as advertised. With a technical foundation in web development, system administration, and user support, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your IT team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage full-cycle WordPress site builds, on-page SEO, and content publishing. I also maintain client websites, troubleshoot technical issues, and track performance using analytics tools. Previously, as a Front-End Developer at ViviDoctor, I developed and optimized features for a healthcare web application using AngularJS and JavaScript, which strengthened my problem-solving and debugging skills.

I have hands-on experience with Windows environments, Microsoft 365, Active Directory, and networking basics (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN). I am fluent in English, have a customer-oriented approach, and am eager to apply my technical skills in a support role. I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available to start immediately.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can support your team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the IT Support (Level 1 & 2) position at Michael Page International (Belgium). With a strong technical foundation in web development, system administration, and user support, I am well-prepared to contribute to your IT team and ensure the smooth operation of IT systems in a dynamic production and office environment.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage full-cycle WordPress site builds, on-page SEO, and content publishing. I also maintain client websites, troubleshoot technical issues, and track performance using analytics tools. Previously, as a Front-End Developer at ViviDoctor, I developed and optimized features for a healthcare web application using AngularJS and JavaScript, which strengthened my problem-solving and debugging skills. Additionally, my experience in warehouse logistics at Katoen Natie taught me accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment.

I have hands-on experience with Windows environments, Microsoft 365, Active Directory, and networking basics (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN). I am fluent in English, have a customer-oriented approach, and am eager to apply my technical skills in a support role. I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available to start immediately.

I am particularly drawn to this role because it combines user support and infrastructure administration, offering opportunities to develop my technical skills further. I am confident that my hands-on mindset and strong troubleshooting abilities will make me a valuable asset to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can support your IT operations.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Hands-on experience with Windows environments, Microsoft 365, and Active Directory
Proven ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues in web development and support roles
Experience with networking basics (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN) and system administration
Strong communication skills and customer-oriented approach, fluent in English
Quick learner with a technical foundation in computer science and applied coursework
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior IT professional with a technical foundation in web development, system administration, and user support. At Episto, I manage full-cycle WordPress site builds, on-page SEO, and content publishing, while maintaining client websites and troubleshooting technical issues. On my own project (mirook.com), I have applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical audits. Comfortable with Windows environments, Microsoft 365, Active Directory, and networking basics; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Windows environment (client & server)
- Microsoft 365 / Active Directory
- Networking (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN)
- User support & troubleshooting
- System administration & maintenance
- WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, website content management
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
